name: Main Library
description: Central campus library with extensive collections, reading halls, and digital resources.

name: Student Cafeteria
description: Main dining hall serving breakfast, lunch, and snacks. Seating for 500+.

name: Computer Science Lab
description: Computer labs with high-end workstations and software for CS students.

name: Chemistry Lab Block
description: Chemistry and physics laboratories with modern equipment.

name: Boys Hostel A
description: Boys hostel with single and shared rooms. Common room and study area.

name: Girls Hostel B
description: Girls hostel with secure premises and 24/7 wardens.

name: Main Parking Lot
description: Primary parking area for two-wheelers and cars. Near main gate.

name: Admin Block
description: Administrative offices, registrar, accounts, and student services.

name: Central Auditorium
description: Main auditorium for events, seminars, and examinations.

name: Sports Complex
description: Indoor sports facility with gym, courts, and swimming pool.
